zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Yard於1385年出生在英國英格蘭戴文牛頓 阿博特時，他的父親Thomas Yard26歲，母親Mrs. Elizonata Yard22歲。他於1409年7月16日與Joan Ferrers在英國英格蘭戴文爾斯頓 費雷斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1467年在他的家鄉享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Yard于1385年出生在英国英格兰戴文牛頓 阿博特时，他的父亲Thomas Yard26岁，母亲Mrs. Elizonata Yard22岁。他于1409年7月16日与Joan Ferrers在英国英格兰戴文爾斯頓 費雷斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1467年在他的家乡享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Yard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Somerset): topographic name for someone who lived ‘in the yard’ or from some minor placed named with Middle English yerde (from Old English geard ‘enclosure, yard’ or Old English gerd, gyrd ‘virgate, thirty acres’). A yardland (30 acres) was a medieval unit of land tenure.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. en.lifeSummary: When Richard Yard was born in 1385, in Newton Abbot, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Yard, was 26 and his mother, Mrs. Elizonata Yard, was 22. He married Joan Ferrers on 16 July 1409, in Churston Ferrers, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1467, in his hometown, at the age of 82.

Il a épousé Joan Ferrers le 16 juillet 1409, à Churston Ferrers, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1467, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 82 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Yardが1385年にイギリスイギリスデボンニュートン アボットで生まれた時，父Thomas Yardは26歳，母Mrs. Elizonata Yardは22歳であった。1409年7月16日にイギリスイギリスデボンチャーストン フエレルズでJoan Ferrersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1467年に故郷で82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Yard(이)가 1385년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 뉴턴 애벗에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Yard(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Elizonata Yard(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1409년 7월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 c후르스턴 페레르스에서 Joan Ferrers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1467년 그의 고향에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Yard родился в 1385 г. в местности нютон эббот, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Yard было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Elizonata Yard, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Ferrers 16 июля 1409 г. в местности чурстон фиррирс, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1467 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 82 лет.
